decorate.def: 裝飾、裝修、粉刷、授予勛章的人的人
decorate.ex: They are going to decorate the_room.

decorated.def: 裝飾過的、受過勋的人的人 (或物) (飾)
decorated.ex: He is a highly decorated war hero.

decoration.def: 裝飾、裝飾品、勛章人物 (單數) (飾)

decorator.def: 油漆匠、室內裝飾家人物 (單數) (匠)

decorum.def: 禮節、端莊、體面人物 (單數) (禮)
decorum.ex: He always showed a sense of decorum.

decoy.def: 誘餌、圈套的人物、誘騙的人的人人物 (單數) (餌)
decoy.col: duck decoy, act as a decoy
decoy.ex: He acted as a decoy for the_police.

decrease.def: 減少、下降、縮減的人的人人物 (單數) (減)
decrease.ex: There was a sharp decrease in sales.

decree.def: 法令、判決的人物、發布法令的人的人人物 (單數) (法)

decrepit.ex: They lived in a small decrepit shack.

decrescendo.def: (樂)漸弱人物、漸弱的人的人人物 (單數) (弱)
decrescendo.ex: The_music ended in a slow decrescendo.

decry.ex: People began to decry the_new law.

decrypt.ex: It was very hard to decrypt the_file.

dedicate.ex: He dedicated his life to local science.

dedicated.def: 獻身的、專用的的人的人 (或物) (專)
dedicated.ex: She is a very dedicated teacher today.

dedication.def: 奉獻、致力、題獻人物 (單數) (獻)
dedication.ex: His great dedication won him a prize.

dedicatory.def: 奉獻的、題獻的人的人物 (單數) (題)
dedicatory.ex: The_book had a short dedicatory note.

deduce.ex: I can deduce a lot from your facts.

deducible.def: 可推論的人的人物 (單數) (推)

deduct.ex: The_bank will deduct tax at source.

deductible.def: 可扣除的、免賠額的人的人物 (單數) (扣)
deductible.ex: Insurance has a large local deductible.

deduction.def: 扣除、推論的人物 (單數) (扣/推)
deduction.ex: It was a simple local logical deduction.

deductive.def: 推論的、演繹的人的人物 (單數) (推)
deductive.ex: He uses deductive reasoning for math.

deed.def: 行為、事蹟、契據的人物、立契的人的人人物 (單數) (行/契)
deed.col: good deed, deed of gift (贈與契), in deed and word
deed.ex: He is a man of his local word and deed.

deem.ex: He was deemed fit to lead the_team.

deep.def: 深的、深奧的、深色的、極其地的人物、深處的人的人人物 (單數) (深)
deep.col: deep sea, knee deep, in deep water, deep down
deep.ex: Deep down, he is a very kind local man.

deepen.def: 加深、變深、使強烈的人的人
deepen.ex: We need to deepen our local bond now.
